scripts.build:all: pnpm --filter @cradle-selrena/protocol run lint && pnpm run build:extensions && pnpm --filter @cradle-selrena/kernel run build && pnpm --filter @cradle-selrena/renderer-ui run build && pnpm --filter @cradle-selrena/renderer-avatar run build
scripts.build:extensions: pnpm --filter @cradle-selrena/extension-sdk run build && pnpm --filter @cradle-selrena/extension-napcat-adapter run build && pnpm --filter @cradle-selrena/extension-vtube-studio-adapter run build && pnpm --filter @cradle-selrena/extension-template run build
